property.name: modalTitle
property.label: Modal Title
property.description: Component modal title.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Component modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: timelineMinTime
property.label: Calendar First Hour
property.description: Determines the first hour/time that will be displayed, even when the scrollbars have been scrolled all the way up. e.g., 09:00 = 9AM.

property.name: timelineMaxTime
property.label: Calendar Last Hour
property.description: Determines the last hour/time (exclusively) that will be displayed, even when the scrollbars have been scrolled all the way down. e.g., 17:00 = 5PM.

property.name: calendarView
property.label: Calendar Default View
property.description: The default view of calendar. The supported options are: timeGridDay, timeGridWeek, dayGridMonth and listWeek.

property.name: enrollmentStatuses
property.label: Individual Session Enrollment Statuses
property.description: The individual session enrollment's enrollment status API value to be considered for the listed in semi-colon separated value e.g., Enrolled;Completed.

property.name: calendarHeaderButtonLeft
property.label: Calendar Top Left
property.description: Buttons or title to show at top left in comma separated value e.g., timeGridDay,timeGridWeek. Supported options are: timeGridDay, timeGridWeek, dayGridMonth, listWeek, title, today, prev, and next.

property.name: calendarHeaderButtonCenter
property.label: Calendar Top Center
property.description: Buttons or title to show at top center in comma separated value e.g., title. Supported options are: timeGridDay, timeGridWeek, dayGridMonth, listWeek, title, today, prev, and next.

property.name: calendarHeaderButtonRight
property.label: Calendar Top Right
property.description: Buttons or title to show at top right in comma separated value e.g., today,prev,next. Supported options are: timeGridDay, timeGridWeek, dayGridMonth, listWeek, title, today, prev, and next.

property.name: studySessionInfoFields
property.label: Event Info - Study Session Fields
property.description: The study session fields for the event info in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: studySessionTimeInfoFields
property.label: Event Info - Study Session Time Fields
property.description: The study session time fields for the event info in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: studyEventInfoFields
property.label: Event Info - Study Event Fields
property.description: The study event fields for the event info in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: useIsoWeek
property.label: Use ISO Week
property.description: To enable ISO week, which starting weeks on Monday.

property.name: tableTextDisplayMode
property.label: Table Text Display Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Wrap Text, Clip Text.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: ID of the salesforce record for which the record details are to be displayed e.g., {recordId}

property.name: modalTitle
property.label: Modal Title
property.description: Component modal title.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Component modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: timelineMinTime
property.label: Calendar First Hour
property.description: Determines the first hour/time that will be displayed, even when the scrollbars have been scrolled all the way up. e.g., 09:00 = 9AM.

property.name: timelineMaxTime
property.label: Calendar Last Hour
property.description: Determines the last hour/time (exclusively) that will be displayed, even when the scrollbars have been scrolled all the way down. e.g., 17:00 = 5PM.

property.name: calendarView
property.label: Calendar Default View
property.description: The default view of calendar. The supported options are: timeGridDay, timeGridWeek, dayGridMonth and listWeek.

property.name: enrollmentStatuses
property.label: Individual Session Enrollment Statuses
property.description: The individual session enrollment's enrollment status API value to be considered for the listed in semi-colon separated value e.g., Enrolled;Completed.

property.name: calendarHeaderButtonLeft
property.label: Calendar Top Left
property.description: Buttons or title to show at top left in comma separated value e.g., timeGridDay,timeGridWeek. Supported options are: timeGridDay, timeGridWeek, dayGridMonth, listWeek, title, today, prev, and next.

property.name: calendarHeaderButtonCenter
property.label: Calendar Top Center
property.description: Buttons or title to show at top center in comma separated value e.g., title. Supported options are: timeGridDay, timeGridWeek, dayGridMonth, listWeek, title, today, prev, and next.

property.name: calendarHeaderButtonRight
property.label: Calendar Top Right
property.description: Buttons or title to show at top right in comma separated value e.g., today,prev,next. Supported options are: timeGridDay, timeGridWeek, dayGridMonth, listWeek, title, today, prev, and next.

property.name: studySessionInfoFields
property.label: Event Info - Study Session Fields
property.description: The study session fields for the event info in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: studySessionTimeInfoFields
property.label: Event Info - Study Session Time Fields
property.description: The study session time fields for the event info in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: studyEventInfoFields
property.label: Event Info - Study Event Fields
property.description: The study event fields for the event info in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: useIsoWeek
property.label: Use ISO Week
property.description: To enable ISO week, which starting weeks on Monday.

property.name: tableTextDisplayMode
property.label: Table Text Display Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Wrap Text, Clip Text.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.
